checklist.note: All load-bearing claims hold: _record_bypass resolves change_id itself at the short-circuit (before _decide's own resolution), fully try/except-wrapped; emit uses skip_validation=True, no refresh_state_after_emit; no-active-change returns early; gate_bypass_disclosure uses append-order (last_disclosed index, no timestamps); verify blocker is in the for-slug loop with no early continue; both event types in EXTENSION_EVENT_TYPES (→KNOWN) and _INFORMATIONAL.
Diff stays within the 22 declared files; no drive-by changes. codex.py 'kill-switch always works' → 'see coverage caveat below' is in-scope A.2 de-surfacing.

Helpers gate_bypass_disclosure/gate_bypass_for_attestation mirror derive_independence/independence_for_attestation (same tolerant parse-loop, EventSchemaError skip); shared _HALT_HINT constant; clean error handling. 154 load-bearing tests green.

No-active-change records nothing; recording failure swallowed (ALLOW preserved); emit accepted via skip_validation (confirmed EmitPreconditionError bypassed); late bypass after disclosure re-blocks (index rule); verify disclosure-line loop reads only validated/existing att files; reasons None-filtered with 'if r'.

grep gate-disabled in AGENTS.md = 0 and 0 in src/adapters; adapter subsections drop literal token + 'always works' hint; getting-started keeps human override + adds disclosure note; cli-reference.md (--disclose-gate-bypass) and state-machine.md (both informational events) regenerated consistently.
